title: Update clinic branding, real content, Birds category, and additional services

requirements.text: Update the homepage hero and About Us section with the real clinic details: clinic name 'treatVET (Veterinary Care Treatment)', operating 24/7, 4+ veterinary experts, 1700+ animals treated, 82% client satisfaction, operating since 2017. Display the full address: treatVET, Tulatali (in front of Padua High School), Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong. Highlight the emergency house-visit service ('In emergency cases, we visit the animal owner's house at any time') and the availability of a standby veterinary specialist.

quotes: Address: treatVET , Tulatali ( in front of padua high School), Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong
In emergency case visit to Animal owner house at any time

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage hero displays 'treatVET' as the clinic name and 'Veterinary Care Treatment' as the tagline or subtitle.
Stat counters/badges show: 24/7, 4+ Experts, 1700+ Animals Treated, 82% Satisfaction, Since 2017.
About Us / contact section displays the full address: treatVET, Tulatali (in front of Padua High School), Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong.
A highlighted callout or badge communicates the 24/7 emergency house-visit service.
Standby veterinary specialist availability is mentioned on the homepage.

requirements.text: Update the Footer component to display the real clinic contact information: clinic name 'treatVET', full address (Tulatali, in front of Padua High School, Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong), 24/7 availability note, and the emergency house-visit highlight.

quotes: Address: treatVET , Tulatali ( in front of padua high School), Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong
In emergency case visit to Animal owner house at any time

acceptanceCriteria: Footer shows clinic name 'treatVET' and full address.
Footer shows 24/7 availability note.
Footer references emergency house-visit service.

requirements.text: Add 'Birds / Poultry' as a fourth animal category throughout the entire application. Sub-types for this category should include: Layer, Broiler, and Color Bird. Update the backend animal category variant to include a Birds/Poultry option. Update all frontend filter controls, appointment booking form dropdowns, service cards, treatment sections, and vaccination sections to include Birds / Poultry as a selectable category.

quotes: Animal picture serial : 1. Pet  2. Large animals  3. Small animals  4. Birds
POst mortem and diagnosis of poultry (layer, broiler, color bird)

acceptanceCriteria: Backend animal category type includes a Birds/Poultry variant.
Services page filter includes 'Birds / Poultry' as a category filter option.
Appointment booking form includes 'Birds / Poultry' in the animal category dropdown.
Treatment Management page includes a 'Birds / Poultry' accordion section.
Vaccination page includes a 'Birds / Poultry' section.
Homepage animal category cards include a Birds / Poultry card alongside Pets, Large Ruminants, and Small Ruminants.

requirements.text: Add the following new service types and seed entries to the backend and surface them on the Services page: (1) Post-Mortem & Poultry Diagnosis — available for the Birds/Poultry category, available more than 15 hours per day, covering layer, broiler, and color birds; (2) Ration Formulation Consultation — consultation service covering all animal categories for feed/ration planning; (3) Animal Housing Planning — consultation service covering all animal categories for housing design and planning. Ensure these services appear in the Services page grid and are selectable in the appointment booking form.

quotes: More than 15 hours a day POst mortem and diagnosis of poultry (layer, broiler, color bird)
Consult ration formulation and animal housing planning

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Post-Mortem & Poultry Diagnosis' service exists in the backend under the Birds/Poultry category with a note about 15+ hours/day availability.
A 'Ration Formulation Consultation' service exists in the backend under the Consultation type.
An 'Animal Housing Planning' service exists in the backend under the Consultation type.
All three services appear as cards on the Services page.
All three services are selectable in the appointment booking form's service dropdown.

requirements.text: Update the Navigation bar logo and brand name to display 'treatVET' with the subtitle 'Veterinary Care Treatment'. Update the browser tab title (index.html or equivalent) to 'treatVET – Veterinary Care Treatment'.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar logo/brand text reads 'treatVET'.
Navigation bar shows 'Veterinary Care Treatment' as a subtitle or tagline.
Browser tab title is 'treatVET – Veterinary Care Treatment'.

requirements.text: Generate and display a series of four animal hero/banner images for the homepage animal category cards in this order: (1) Pets (dogs, cats), (2) Large Animals (cattle, buffalo, camel), (3) Small Animals (sheep, goats), (4) Birds/Poultry (layer hens, broiler chickens, color birds). Render them as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: Animal picture serial : 1. Pet  2. Large animals  3. Small animals  4. Birds

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage animal category section shows four cards with distinct images for Pets, Large Animals, Small Animals, and Birds/Poultry in that order.
Images are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated.
Each image is visually representative of its animal category.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file.
Preserve all existing routes and page structure; only extend or update content.
nonGoals: Adding a new separate Poultry/Birds dedicated page — the existing pages should be extended with the new category.
Implementing real-time notifications or SMS for emergency alerts.
Adding a payment or billing system.

required: Warm photo-realistic illustration of pets — a dog and a cat together in a clinic setting with earthy green tones (animal-pets.dim_600x400.png)
Warm photo-realistic illustration of large farm animals — cattle, buffalo, and camel in a rural field with earthy warm tones (animal-large.dim_600x400.png)
Warm photo-realistic illustration of small ruminants — sheep and goats in a pastoral setting with soft warm tones (animal-small.dim_600x400.png)
Warm photo-realistic illustration of poultry birds — layer hens, broiler chickens, and colorful birds in a farm setting with warm earthy tones (animal-birds.dim_600x400.png)
